description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile red sports car with a streamlined body and aerodynamic curves, reminiscent of classic Italian supercars. The car features a sharply sloped hood, wide front grille, and pop-up style headlights, with black-tinted windows and side mirrors. Along the sides, there are distinctive horizontal air intakes and sculpted lines that enhance its aggressive stance. The rear showcases a louvered engine cover, quad exhaust pipes, and a subtle integrated spoiler, with a license plate and detailed taillights. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys with visible brake calipers, adding to its performance-oriented appearance. The overall design suggests a high-performance vehicle built for speed and style, likely constructed from lightweight metals and composites.
description: A striking red sports car with a low, aerodynamic body, black-tinted windows, and multi-spoke alloy wheels. It features sculpted side intakes, a louvered rear engine cover, and quad exhausts.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply sloped hood, wide grille, pop-up headlights, and black windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted side intakes, two doors, and large alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the louvered engine cover, quad exhaust pipes, taillights, and license plate.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side intakes, two doors, and alloy wheels.
